title: rust-rpm-sequoia bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.9.0.3-1]
- Include MD5 in ossl bindings and sequoia-openpgp for RPM

[1.9.0.2-1]
- Build 1.9.0 version with ossl bindings to unbreak FIPS

[1.9.0.1-1]
- Pull PQC crypto to rpm-sequoia
full_text:
[1.9.0.3-1]
- Include MD5 in ossl bindings and sequoia-openpgp for RPM

[1.9.0.2-1]
- Build 1.9.0 version with ossl bindings to unbreak FIPS

[1.9.0.1-1]
- Pull PQC crypto to rpm-sequoia

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20189-0.html
